zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot於1280年出生在德國海因里希_海普洛文次爾利時，她的父親Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot26歲，母親Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon25歲。她於1299年12月13日之前與Gerhard V. von Jülich結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot于1280年出生在德国海因里希_海普洛文次爾利时，她的父亲Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot26岁，母亲Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon25岁。她于1299年12月13日之前与Gerhard V. von Jülich结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot was born in 1280, in Jülich, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, her father, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, was 26 and her mother, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, was 25. She married Gerhard V. von Jülich before 13 December 1299. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1350, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot est née en 1280, à Jülich, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard V. von Jülich avant 13 décembre 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot 1280 in Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot 26 und ihre Mutter Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon 25. Sie hat vor 13. Dezember 1299 Gerhard V. von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot è nata il nel 1280 nel Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gerhard V. von Jülich prima del 13 dicembre 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1350, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschotが1280年にドイツプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズジuリチで生まれた時，父Godfried van Brabant-Aarschotは26歳，母Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzonは25歳であった。1299年12月13日以前にGerhard V. von Jülichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot(이)가 1280년 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 ju리치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1299년 12월 13일 이전 Gerhard V. von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot nasceu em 1280, em Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard V. von Jülich antes 13 de dezembro de 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot родилась в 1280 г. в местности джuлич, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard V. von Jülich перед 13 декабрь 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth van Brabant-Aarschot nació en 1280, en Jülich, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Godfried van Brabant-Aarschot, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Jeanne Isabeau de Vierzon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Gerhard V. von Jülich antes de 13 de diciembre de 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1350, a la edad de 70 años.
